subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! The Lord of the unseen and the seen remembereth thee from this praiseworthy station, and announceth unto thee God's tender mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود یذکرک مالک الغیب و الشهود من هذا المقام المحمود و یبشرک بعنایه الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
